summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEW MCA Enrichment feature + full regression testing. Backend: 100% success (36/36 API tests including new enrichment-progress endpoint). Frontend: 100% success (13/13 dashboard elements + 7/7 regression pages). All features working correctly including human-in-the-loop batch runner dashboard, session governance, copy commands with clipboard fallback, and protected route authentication.
passed_tests: Backend: NEW GET /api/v1/admin/enrichment-progress returns 200 with all required fields
Backend: enrichment-progress response includes progress{total=437, enriched=266, remaining=171, not_yet_attempted=171, attempted_failed=0, permanently_failed=0, progress_pct=60.9}

Backend: enrichment-progress response includes governance{sessions_today=0, max_sessions_per_day=3, min_gap_hours=3, batch_size=400, time_budget_minutes=110, max_consecutive_failures=5, can_start_now=true, auto_enrichment_disabled=true}
Backend: enrichment-progress response includes commands{run_session, retry_failed, set_cookie}
Backend: enrichment-progress response includes cohort_description and recent_sessions
